title: Anthropic mulls mandatory employee stock trading plans after IPO, The Information reports
excerpt: At Yahoo Finance, you get free stock quotes, up-to-date news, portfolio management resources, international market data, social interaction and mortgage rates that help you manage your financial life.
content_html:
Reuters

Thu, July 23, 2026 at 7:12 AM PDT 1 min read

(Corrects to remove extraneous word in Bullet 1)

July 23 (Reuters) - Anthropic is considering requiring rank-and-file employees to sell ‌stock through preset trading plans after it goes public ‌to avoid insider-trading concerns, The Information reported on Thursday, citing people familiar with ​the matter.

The Claude code creator and rival OpenAI are racing to go public as investor appetite for artificial intelligence fuels soaring valuations and companies compete to set the benchmark for valuing frontier ‌AI firms.

• All Anthropic ⁠employees might have to use 10b5-1 trading plans, which require stock sales according to preset schedules and ⁠are typically used only by top executives and certain finance and legal staff, according to the Information report.

• Anthropic did not ​immediately respond ​to a Reuters request for ​comment.

• The plans would require ‌employees to sell shares according to preset schedules specifying the timing, amount and price of stock sales, the report said.

• Discussions among Anthropic officials and outside advisers are ongoing, and it could not be learned whether the company had made a decision, ‌it added.

• The company is also ​weighing how much stock existing shareholders ​can sell on the ​first day of trading and the length of ‌post-IPO lockup periods, the report ​said.

• Public companies ​typically allow most employees to sell shares during trading windows following earnings reports, while preset trading plans could allow ​sales outside those windows ‌but limit employees' discretion over the timing and size ​of trades, the report added.

(Reporting by Anzar Mehraj in ​Bengaluru; Editing by Joyjeet Das)

content_html_zh:
路透社

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 23 日星期四上午 7:12 阅读时间 1 分钟

（更正以删除项目符号 1 中的无关词）

7 月 23 日（路透社） - 据 The Information 周四援引知情人士的话报道，Anthropic 正在考虑要求普通员工在上市后通过预设交易计划出售股票，以避免内幕交易担忧。

随着投资者对人工智能的兴趣推动估值飙升，以及各公司竞相为前沿人工智能公司设定估值基准，Claude 代码创建者和竞争对手 OpenAI 正在竞相上市。

• 根据信息报告，所有 Anthropic 员工可能必须使用 10b5-1 交易计划，该计划要求根据预设时间表出售股票，并且通常仅由高层管理人员以及某些财务和法律人员使用。

• Anthropic 没有立即回应路透社的置评请求。

• 报告称，该计划将要求员工按照预设的时间表出售股票，具体规定了股票出售的时间、数量和价格。

• 它补充说，Anthropic 官员和外部顾问之间的讨论正在进行中，目前尚不清楚该公司是否已做出决定。

• 报告称，该公司还在权衡现有股东在交易首日可以出售多少股票以及 IPO 后禁售期的长度。

• 报告补充说，上市公司通常允许大多数员工在收益报告发布后的交易窗口期间出售股票，而预设的交易计划可能允许在这些窗口之外出售股票，但限制员工对交易时间和规模的自由裁量权。

（Anzar Mehraj 班加罗尔报道；Joyjeet Das 编辑）
